target.name: Nightingale Nursing Home, Lowville, Ahascragh, Ballinasloe, County Galway
target.normalized_name: nightingale nursing home lowville ahascragh ballinasloe county galway
target.summary: Offers in excess of 1,100,000.00 invited. Team McCullagh are delighted to present Nightingale Nursing Home, a rare and exceptional opportunity to acquire a long-established, purpose-built, and fully operational residential care facility in the heart of East Galway. Located in Lowville, just two minutes from Ahascragh village and ten minutes from Ballinasloe town, this single-storey nursing home sits on a c. 0.41 hectare (1 acre) site and comprises approximately 688 square metres (7,405 sq. ft) of modern, well-maintained accommodation. Built in 1996 and extended in 2005, Nightingale Nursing Home has played a vital role in the provision of elderly care services within the local community. The property is registered for 31 residents and features 13 twin bedrooms and 5 single bedrooms, including 2 with ensuite facilities. The home has been carefully designed to ensure comfort, safety, and accessibility for all residents. It includes spacious private and communal living areas, attractive landscaped gardens, and is fully compliant with current fire safety and accessibility standards. A B2 BER rating further reflects the quality and efficiency of the property. Nightingale Nursing Home is registered and fully compliant with HIQA, with current registration valid from November 2023 to November 2026. Nightingale Nursing Home provides 24-hour nursing care to residents aged 65 and over. Services include long-term residential care, short-term stays, respite care, and palliative care. Residents retain access to their own GP and benefit from regular visits by allied health professionals, including physiotherapists, occupational therapists, speech and language therapists, chiropodists, and dietitians, many of whom are available through HSE entitlements. The home`s care philosophy is rooted in a holistic, person-centred approach. It promotes independence, dignity, and a high quality of life for every resident, while also addressing their emotional, social, spiritual, and psychological well-being. Family involvement is an integral part of the care planning process, fostering a strong community environment within the home. Nightingale benefits from a strong reputation locally and receives referrals not only from the surrounding community but also from three referring hospitals, ensuring a consistent flow of potential residents. The home enjoys high occupancy levels, reflecting both demand for its services and the quality of care provided. This is a genuine retirement sale and presents a unique opportunity for healthcare operators or investors seeking to enter or expand within the residential care sector. With its excellent reputation, regulatory compliance, high occupancy, and strategic location in a growing region, Nightingale Nursing Home offers a turnkey solution with strong long-term potential. For further information or to arrange a confidential viewing, please contact Cathal Meares of Sheehy MearesTeam McCullagh on 086 140 9158

ic_report.target_identity: Nightingale Nursing Home, Lowville, Ahascragh, Ballinasloe, County Galway

company_overview.name: Nightingale Nursing Home, Lowville, Ahascragh, Ballinasloe, County Galway

source_evidence.value: Nightingale Nursing Home, Lowville, Ahascragh, Ballinasloe, County Galway
nightingale nursing home lowville ahascragh ballinasloe county galway

Offers in excess of 1,100,000.00 invited. Team McCullagh are delighted to present Nightingale Nursing Home, a rare and exceptional opportunity to acquire a long-established, purpose-built, and fully operational residential care facility in the heart of East Galway. Located in Lowville, just two minutes from Ahascragh village and ten minutes from Ballinasloe town, this single-storey nursing home sits on a c. 0.41 hectare (1 acre) site and comprises approximately 688 square metres (7,405 sq. ft) of modern, well-maintained accommodation. Built in 1996 and extended in 2005, Nightingale Nursing Home has played a vital role in the provision of elderly care services within the local community. The property is registered for 31 residents and features 13 twin bedrooms and 5 single bedrooms, including 2 with ensuite facilities. The home has been carefully designed to ensure comfort, safety, and accessibility for all residents. It includes spacious private and communal living areas, attractive landscaped gardens, and is fully compliant with current fire safety and accessibility standards. A B2 BER rating further reflects the quality and efficiency of the property. Nightingale Nursing Home is registered and fully compliant with HIQA, with current registration valid from November 2023 to November 2026. Nightingale Nursing Home provides 24-hour nursing care to residents aged 65 and over. Services include long-term residential care, short-term stays, respite care, and palliative care. Residents retain access to their own GP and benefit from regular visits by allied health professionals, including physiotherapists, occupational therapists, speech and language therapists, chiropodists, and dietitians, many of whom are available through HSE entitlements. The home`s care philosophy is rooted in a holistic, person-centred approach. It promotes independence, dignity, and a high quality of life for every resident, while also addressing their emotional, social, spiritual, and psychological well-being. Family involvement is an integral part of the care planning process, fostering a strong community environment within the home. Nightingale benefits from a strong reputation locally and receives referrals not only from the surrounding community but also from three referring hospitals, ensuring a consistent flow of potential residents. The home enjoys high occupancy levels, reflecting both demand for its services and the quality of care provided. This is a genuine retirement sale and presents a unique opportunity for healthcare operators or investors seeking to enter or expand within the residential care sector. With its excellent reputation, regulatory compliance, high occupancy, and strategic location in a growing region, Nightingale Nursing Home offers a turnkey solution with strong long-term potential. For further information or to arrange a confidential viewing, please contact Cathal Meares of Sheehy MearesTeam McCullagh on 086 140 9158

target.name: Mortons of Galway, Salthill, Galway., Salthill, Galway City
target.normalized_name: mortons of galway salthill galway salthill galway city
target.summary: Colleran Auctioneers are delighted to be favoured with the sale of one of Galway€TM much loved ,successful and award winning food emporiums. Mortons of Galway was established in 2003 by Eric Morton, continuing a family tradition started by his grandparents Charles & Esther Morton when they opened their first door in Dublin in 1934. Now known throughout the West as a quality food outlet, Mortons of Galway is known for the excellence of its food products which include an instore bakery, delicatessen, local fresh fruit and veg, butchers, fish counters and a very large selection of quality fine wines and foods. In the last two years the owner Eric has invested significantly in refitting the shop which has resulted in even further growth of this already very successful business. Located prominently in one of Irelands premier seaside resorts, Salthill is a booming area and is no longer just a summer destination. Salthill saw an unprecedented demand for property during Covid as everyone realised how much Salthill has to offer with every amenity on its doorstep from some of Galway€TM finest schools both primary and secondary, unlimited sports and recreational facilities and a large selection of award winning coffee shops and restaurants. Mortons is strategically located on the main access road in and out of Salthill and serves a large catchment area. Mortons of Galway is now being offered for sale as a very profitable going concern to include a large prime retail outlet with large yard for deliveries and outbuildings for additional storage. The newly refurbished retail unit consist of over 4,600 square feet of ground floor retail, ancillary service space and stores. On the first floor there is an additional 1,500 sqft which includes a new bakery and food preparation area, staff facilities and offices. The first floor also includes independent living consisting of a spacious 950sqft three bedroomed apartment. There is a large back yard with rear access for deliveries and a number of refrigerated stores. Above all Mortons of Galway offers a unique opportunity due to the owner€TM retirement to purchase a very successful and profitable business. Genuine enquires only by appointment with Don Colleran, Colleran Auctioneers, 21 Eyre Square, Galway 091 562293.

ic_report.target_identity: Mortons of Galway, Salthill, Galway., Salthill, Galway City

company_overview.name: Mortons of Galway, Salthill, Galway., Salthill, Galway City

source_evidence.value: Mortons of Galway, Salthill, Galway., Salthill, Galway City
mortons of galway salthill galway salthill galway city

Colleran Auctioneers are delighted to be favoured with the sale of one of Galway€TM much loved ,successful and award winning food emporiums. Mortons of Galway was established in 2003 by Eric Morton, continuing a family tradition started by his grandparents Charles & Esther Morton when they opened their first door in Dublin in 1934. Now known throughout the West as a quality food outlet, Mortons of Galway is known for the excellence of its food products which include an instore bakery, delicatessen, local fresh fruit and veg, butchers, fish counters and a very large selection of quality fine wines and foods. In the last two years the owner Eric has invested significantly in refitting the shop which has resulted in even further growth of this already very successful business. Located prominently in one of Irelands premier seaside resorts, Salthill is a booming area and is no longer just a summer destination. Salthill saw an unprecedented demand for property during Covid as everyone realised how much Salthill has to offer with every amenity on its doorstep from some of Galway€TM finest schools both primary and secondary, unlimited sports and recreational facilities and a large selection of award winning coffee shops and restaurants. Mortons is strategically located on the main access road in and out of Salthill and serves a large catchment area. Mortons of Galway is now being offered for sale as a very profitable going concern to include a large prime retail outlet with large yard for deliveries and outbuildings for additional storage. The newly refurbished retail unit consist of over 4,600 square feet of ground floor retail, ancillary service space and stores. On the first floor there is an additional 1,500 sqft which includes a new bakery and food preparation area, staff facilities and offices. The first floor also includes independent living consisting of a spacious 950sqft three bedroomed apartment. There is a large back yard with rear access for deliveries and a number of refrigerated stores. Above all Mortons of Galway offers a unique opportunity due to the owner€TM retirement to purchase a very successful and profitable business. Genuine enquires only by appointment with Don Colleran, Colleran Auctioneers, 21 Eyre Square, Galway 091 562293.

target.summary: • Established online platform connecting parents and educators across Ireland for 2+decades. • Generates revenue through advertising, sponsorships, listings, subscriptions, and branded content. • Primary income from advertising campaigns and sponsored placements with Irish schools, SMEs, and national family brands. • Paid listings for schools, summer camps, and after-school activities provide consistent lead generation for education providers. • Newly launched subscription-based service connects parents with verified childcare providers and tutors. • Offers sponsored articles and content partnerships that engage parents while maintaining editorial trust. • Strong digital presence with 842,000 active users (Jan–Oct), 26,000 newsletter subscribers, and 135,000+ social media followers. • 99% organic web traffic reflects high search authority and long-term audience loyalty. • The business is run by a small, efficient team of two direct employees supported by specialist contractors for technical and marketing work. • Expansion opportunities include scaling the childcare and tutoring marketplace nationwide, launching premium parent memberships, and developing direct brand partnerships across education, wellbeing, and family services. • Does not need any approvals to operate. SMERGERS public listing card observed 2026-06-25.

target.name: Solar Projects Company for Sale in Dublin, Ireland
target.normalized_name: solar projects for sale in dublin ireland
target.summary: Located in Dublin, the business specializes in the sale of a 200 kW solar photovoltaic (PV) project portfolio in Ireland, catering to the growing renewable energy sector. - The company develops investment-ready commercial and industrial solar PV Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) projects, focusing on sustainability and reducing energy costs for businesses. - The portfolio for sale comprises four operational rooftop solar PV projects, including three retail sites and one industrial manufacturing facility, ensuring diversified revenue through multiple commercial off takers. - All projects are established under long-term PPAs, allowing host businesses to significantly lower their on-site electricity costs while guaranteeing stable energy supply. - With a total installed capacity of approximately 200 kW, the portfolio is designed to generate reliable cash flows, appealing to energy and infrastructure investors seeking secure and sustainable investment opportunities. - The expected investor return on this solar project portfolio is approximately 14%, making it an attractive choice for those looking to invest in low-risk renewable energy ventures. - This business model promotes a win-win scenario: investors benefit from contracted revenues and stable returns, while host customers enjoy reduced energy costs and contribute to the transition to renewable energy. - Long-term PPAs further reduce administrative effort, as revenue collection and customer engagement are stable and predictable, allowing the business to operate efficiently with a small, lean team. - The business operates with a valid registration certificate. SMERGERS public listing card observed 2026-06-25.

target.name: O'Connor Fuels, 2 St Endas Avenue, Tuam, Galway
target.normalized_name: o connor fuels 2 st endas avenue tuam galway
target.summary: FABULOUS OPPORTUNITY TO ACQUIRE AN ESTABLISHED FUEL BUSINESS INCORPORATING A GARDEN CENTRE, HARDWARE AND DIY LOCATED IN THE HEART OF TUAM TOWN. O'Connor Fuels has been successfully trading and is well established in the industry. The business will be sold as a going concern and accounts can be made available to serious interested parties once a Non Disclosure Agreement has been signed. O'Connor Fuels currently trades from Cloontooa Road on circa 0.3 of an acre, complete with a retail unit. The unique central location of such a sizable site is a great benefit to the business which brings with it a large percentage of return business. Already a very successful business model, there is huge potential to further diversify the business and in turn create an extra fee avenue. The retail unit located in the yard could be a fine example of this, giving options to sell a wide selection of commodities that will complement the current business model, with sales of solid fuel, garden centre, DIY, hardware, pet food, etc. There is planning for DIY & light hardware. As O'Connor Fuels is a trading business, viewings and all enquiries are strictly by appointment only. Contact our office today to avoid disappointment!

source_evidence.value: public advertised-for-sale listing EUR 5 Mn SMERGERS public listing card observed 2026-06-25.
Telemedicine Company for Sale in Dublin, Ireland
telemedicine for sale in dublin ireland

The business operates in the rapidly growing telemedicine sector, operating as a healthcare portal, providing essential healthcare services through a digital platform. - Based in Dublin, the company benefits from a strategic position in a thriving healthcare market. - Business has successfully built a robust client base of nearly 30,000 patients, indicating strong demand and trust in its services. - Demonstrated significant revenue growth with last year's revenue surpassing EUR 700,000, and projected to exceed EUR 850,000 this year. - The average consultation price of EUR 45 positions the business competitively within the market, with a premium offering of EUR 900 for a comprehensive 3-step GP consultation process. - Business collaborates with 10-12 certified medical professionals, certified by the Irish Medical Council, ensuring high-quality care and adherence to regulatory standards. They are hired on a contractual basis and receive the payment per hour for the consultations. - Company retains full ownership of client data, enhancing its potential for future data-driven services and insights. - Company is in the process of attaining ISO certification. SMERGERS public listing card observed 2026-06-25.

target.name: Digital Marketing Company for Sale in Dublin, Ireland
target.normalized_name: digital marketing for sale in dublin ireland
target.summary: A. Established client base: The client base is both B2B (80%) and B2C (20%). The client base is an SME segment spread out in various counties in Ireland. B. Lifetime client base of 25+ customers worked in the last 2.5 years. C. Retainer revenue model: 90% of revenue comes from long-term monthly retainers, ensuring steady and predictable income each month. D. Annual revenue: €52,000 last year, with current year projections of about €70,000. E. Profitability (EBITDA): 50%-60% profit margin. F. Our expertise in digital marketing has earned us the recognition of Awarded the Digital Marketing Agency of the Year last year, and Most Dedicated Agency of the this year. G. Automated lead generation system: The company has an outreach engine in place using an online platform for cold email campaigns. H. Streamlined project management: All client work, internal tasks, and reports are managed through a project management tool. I. Detailed Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) for every process are in place, meaning operations are well-documented and easy to learn. A new owner can step in and follow the SOPs to maintain quality and efficiency, or quickly train new staff as the business grows. J. Skilled & self-sufficient team: The delivery team is composed of: I. Account manager (Based in Ireland). Ii. Operations manager (Remote resources based in India). Iii. Operations executive (Remote resources based in India). The remote team handles day-to-day operations. In addition, we leverage trusted freelance vendors for fulfilment. K. Not owner-dependent: This business is not a one-person show. The structured processes and capable team ensure that the agency isn’t reliant on the current owner’s personal involvement for success. Any digital marketing professional (or team) can run it independently. The current owner will be available for a smooth transition. The company is registered with incorporation certification. This will be a brand transfer and not company transfer. SMERGERS public listing card observed 2026-06-25.

target.normalized_name: tour operator for sale in dublin ireland
target.summary: • Dublin-based cultural tourism operator specializing in native-language guided travel experiences across Ireland. • Delivers daily guided tours, premium multi-day travel circuits, and customized tourism experiences for Spanish- and Italian-speaking visitors. • Serves more than 6,000 guests annually, with significant growth potential within the large Spanish-speaking tourism market visiting Ireland. Peak months include June to August. • Revenue is generated through three diversified streams: high-frequency daily guided tours, premium multi-day circuits, and recurring B2B partnerships. • Daily guided tours form the core volume driver of the business, while multi-day circuits generate higher-value bookings and stronger margins. • Maintains established B2B relationships with travel agencies, tour operators, and tourism partners that provide contracted and repeatable business volumes. • Operates an asset-light business model with no owned vehicle fleet or accommodation inventory, resulting in low fixed costs and minimal capital expenditure requirements. • Utilizes a flexible network of native-speaking guides that can be scaled according to seasonal demand and booking volumes. • Differentiates itself through native-language tour delivery, providing culturally relevant experiences that are difficult for generalist operators and online travel agencies to replicate. • Benefits from diversified customer acquisition channels combining direct consumer demand with recurring partner-generated bookings. • Well-positioned to capitalize on continued growth in inbound tourism to Ireland and increasing demand for localized travel experiences. • Operates with a valid business license. SMERGERS public listing card observed 2026-06-25.

Peak months include June to August. • Revenue is generated through three diversified streams: high-frequency daily guided tours, premium multi-day circuits, and recurring B2B partnerships. • Daily guided tours form the core volume driver of the business, while multi-day circuits generate higher-value bookings and stronger margins. • Maintains established B2B relationships with travel agencies, tour operators, and tourism partners that provide contracted and repeatable business volumes. • Operates an asset-light business model with no owned vehicle fleet or accommodation inventory, resulting in low fixed costs and minimal capital expenditure requirements. • Utilizes a flexible network of native-speaking guides that can be scaled according to seasonal demand and booking volumes. • Differentiates itself through native-language tour delivery, providing culturally relevant experiences that are difficult for generalist operators and online travel agencies to replicate. • Benefits from diversified customer acquisition channels combining direct consumer demand with recurring partner-generated bookings. • Well-positioned to capitalize on continued growth in inbound tourism to Ireland and increasing demand for localized travel experiences. • Operates with a valid business license. target.name: Newly Established Specialty Pharmaceuticals Company Equity Stake For Sale in Dublin, Ireland
target.normalized_name: newly established specialty pharmaceuticals equity stake for sale in dublin ireland
target.summary: Promoter experience: - The CEO brings 12+ years of pharmaceutical commercialisation and GTM strategy across EU and GCC markets, with experience leading €40M+ product launches through Temple Group. The scientific and clinical advisory team draws on backgrounds from Pfizer, TCD, RCSI, the Pasteur Institute, and NCRI. Scientific foundation: - The platform is built on 3,400+ peer-reviewed studies on core bioactive compounds — azadirachtin, gedunin, nimbin, and nimbolide — published between the last 25 years. - Efficacy is scientifically established; the patent landscape remains open. Revenue model: - Three streams in sequence: Direct-to-consumer and pharmacy sales (from Year 1), prescription therapeutics and clinical licensing (from Year 2), and molecule licensing and pharma co-development agreements (from Year 3). 15% of net profit is ring-fenced annually into R&D. IP & regulatory positioning: - Patent filings on novel botanical molecule derivatives are planned within 18 months of production launch. Ireland's Knowledge Development Box provides a 6.25% effective tax rate on qualifying patent income which is a structural advantage for an IP-led business. Incorporation: - We are an registered Irish company, incorporated in Dublin, with full corporate documentation in place. Stage: - Pre-revenue, pre-clinical, with the lead product (psoriasis cream) entering production this year. SMERGERS public listing card observed 2026-06-25.
